title: Infobip API keys should not be disclosed
description: Infobip is a global cloud communications platform for SMS, WhatsApp, email, voice, and other channels. API keys authenticate all API requests. Exposing keys allows unauthorized messaging at your expense and access to customer communication data.
recommendation: Remove Infobip API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate immediately in the Infobip web interface.
impact: Unauthorized multichannel messaging at your expense, potential spam/phishing campaigns, and access to communication logs.

checks.message: Infobip API key detected in variable assignment. Infobip API keys authenticate multichannel communication requests including SMS, WhatsApp Business, email, voice calls, and push notifications. Exposing this key enables unauthorized message sending billed to your account, access to delivery reports and message logs, and potential phishing campaigns across multiple channels. Rotate immediately in the Infobip web interface.
